tests_run.notes: Syntax check on the new file and the modified shell.

Test file does not yet exist on this branch — owned by the dossier-df/qa (tests-screens) lane. Workshop emits [data-action="resume-cover"] and [data-action="resume-tailor"] on the primary buttons so the qa lane's selectors will match.
8/8 tests passed; the workshop is the consumer of these contracts and does not change the producer behavior.

341/343 tests passed. The 2 failing tests live in tests/draft-generation-stability.test.mjs ('ATS scorecard state is reset when modal opens in loading state' and 'retry-ats-scorecard button uses current active draft text'); confirmed pre-existing on the base via git stash + re-run, so they are not regressions from this lane.

tests_run.command: in-process render smoke test (vm.runInContext) of role-workshop.js
tests_run.notes: renderWorkshop on a fixture VM produces .mode-divider · <aside class="workshop"> · workshop__bar · workshop__grid with the 5-step stepper (Researching/Applied done|current rendered correctly), Timeline with timeline__val--urgent applied at daysUntil <= 3 and dropped at daysUntil >= 4, ATS card transitioning loading→success(78/100, Strong:, Weak:, See full scorecard →)→error(Retry)→loading. Click delegation verified for each Workshop affordance: stepper buttons emit jb:role:writeback {field:'stage'}, chips emit jb:role:writeback for heardBack/reply/followupAt(today+3)/passed:true, ats-modal-open emits jb:ats:modal:open, ats-state-retry emits jb:ats:state:request, Tailor/Cover emit jb:role:action and trigger letter-region scrollIntoView. On mount and on jb:role:opened, jb:ats:state:request is dispatched on both window and document.

contract_concerns: None. Workshop preserves jb:role:action (for Tailor/Cover, identical payload to legacy role.js wireDossier), and the four AGENT_CONTRACT.md events (jb:ats:state listened, jb:ats:state:request emitted, jb:ats:modal:open emitted, jb:role:writeback emitted) — all with the contracted payload shapes. Sheet write-back happens via flowing-writes.js's jb:role:writeback bridge (heardBack→Pipeline!R, reply→Pipeline!S 'Yes', followupAt→Pipeline!P, passed→Pipeline!M 'Passed', stage→Pipeline!M label). Resume/cover/ATS generation is unaffected: the buttons keep [data-action="resume-tailor"] and [data-action="resume-cover"], which role.js's wireDossier still handles for letter-region scroll + jb:role:action dispatch. Discovery webhook and schemas/pipeline-row.v1.json are untouched.
notes:
Commit d759ea7 on dossier-df/workshop. role-workshop.js exposes window.JobBoredDossierWorkshop.renderWorkshop(mount, vm) and is loaded immediately after role.js in index.html (the brief lane's role-brief.js script tag is not yet merged on this branch — when integration merges both lanes, my tag will sit between role.js and role-workshop.js per the integration handoff). role.js's renderDossier was extended additively: a
mount-point is appended after the legacy
, and a single conditional call to window.JobBoredDossierWorkshop.renderWorkshop(workshopMount, vm) was added after wireDossier(region, job) so the workshop renders on every dossier render. The legacy detail-drawer section + wireDossier are deliberately left in place per the 'do not touch any other line of role.js' rule; the brief lane will replace that block with its own brief markup, and the integration lane will reconcile the two additions inside a shared .dossier wrapper per docs/redesign/handoffs/dossier-df-integration.md. Mode divider is rendered as a sibling of
inside the workshop mount, keeping it visually above the workshop card per the wireframe (docs/redesign/dossier-direction-f-wireframe.html). Stepper steps are
